reasoning: Both models found all build/install scripts safe. Qwen's inconclusive result stems from a technical error analyzing main.js, which deepseek properly reviewed as safe telemetry code. No actual threats found in any execution-critical components.
disagreement_analysis: Qwen failed to analyze main.js due to a model error (400 response), while deepseek successfully reviewed it as safe. This technical failure caused the inconclusive result.
learnings: Improve error handling for large/minified JS files
Prioritize reviewing files referenced in PKGBUILD/install scripts first
Add fallback mechanisms when models fail to analyze critical files
